identity.name: Lightline
identity.description: A premium, cyberpunk-inspired VPN management dashboard for the modern internet.

headings.usage: All section headers, page titles, and modal headers. Use uppercase with wide tracking for labels.

code.usage: IP addresses, API keys, Logs, Server IDs, Port numbers.

colors.theme_strategy: Dark Mode First (Light Mode via Toggle)

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode B for Dashboard, Mode A for Overview)

containers.card: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
containers.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-black/90 border-r border-white/10 hidden md:flex flex-col z-50
containers.main_content: md:ml-64 min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)] rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-gray-400 hover:text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-cyan-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500/50 rounded-md h-10 px-3 text-sm placeholder:text-gray-600 transition-all

cards.dashboard_widget: relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-950/50 border border-white/5 p-6 rounded-xl hover:border-cyan-500/20 transition-colors group

tables.header: bg-white/5 text-gray-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-medium h-10

navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-cyan-400 hover:bg-cyan-950/30 transition-all text-sm font-medium

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 18-20px for UI, 24px for Nav

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is APCA compliant. Use gray-300 or lighter on dark backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings (cyan-500) on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings to give a modern tech feel.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for any IP address, Port, Key, or Log entry.
Implement the Dashboard with a Bento Grid layout (Mode B).
Use Recharts for traffic statistics with custom dark-mode tooltips.
Ensure the Sidebar is collapsible on mobile.
Use the provided image URLs for the Login background and decorative elements.
Strictly follow the 'Dark Mode First' strategy.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use gradients for text. Keep text solid for readability.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles (sharp or slightly rounded).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
